channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: People not picking up after their dog, 1st March
item.description:
This has been here for over a month and it's becoming more frequent with dog owners not cleaning up after their dog outside our front gates.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain on Genesta Road just before Eglinton Hill junction, 1st March
item.description:
Photos taken 1st March 2026. Just past 29 Eglinton Hill as you turn into Genesta Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car untaxed for 2 months dumped outside 46 Genesta Road, 1st March
item.description:
There’s a 2nd car along the same stretch of road abandoned outside 46 Genesta Road. Photos taken 1st March 2026. Car clearly abandoned in an area notorious for cars being abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Genesta Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left over road wk materials, 1st March
item.description:
Been left for wks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, The Crescent, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unacceptable dumping of Lime on pedestrian only Datchelor Place, 1st March
item.description:
Not good enough. Move it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Datchelor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car untaxed for 2 months abandoned outside 50 Genesta Road, 1st March
item.description:
Car has flat tyres and is clearly abandoned. Area is notorious for abandoned untaxed cars. Whoever left it here is leaving untaxed/SORN cars littered all over Barnfield, Wrottesley Road, Genesta Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Genesta Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tipping again, 1st March
item.description:
Thank you so much for your assistance with another incident of fly tipping on this road - this time it is section of ?sofa which have been fly tipped. An eye sore and prone to accumulating rubbish. Thank you for your swift clearance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)
